rationale.fidelity: Compares both methods on the same routing choices, constraints, and objective and accurately distinguishes incumbents, bounds, and certificates.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes the latency-quality-assurance trade-off concrete and ties preferences to conditional deadlines or actions, but cannot complete the pathway because the case supplies none.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Not requested or claimed; it expressly notes that literature position and study results are absent.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Treats both operational-value pathways as hypotheses and rejects unconditional method superiority.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear and logically organized, with modest excess diagnostic framing.
rationale.overall: A rigorous method comparison that correctly stops short of managerial superiority.
